Loading PrivateDAO

Preparing the live product surface

PrivateDAO is loading wallet-ready controls, Devnet context, and proof-linked routes so the app lands with real content instead of an empty frame.

Preparing wallet-aware controls
Loading live Devnet context
Attaching proof and action rails
PrivateDAO is a privacy-focused governance and treasury product on Solana with additive hardening, runtime evidence, and reviewer-ready proof surfaces.
Built with execution support from a multi-national technical team. Product direction, execution accountability, and external coordination are led by Fahd Kotb.

System rails

ZK: privacy review and proof anchors
REFHE: confidential settlement and payout posture
MagicBlock: execution corridor for responsive paths
Fast RPC: operational speed, diagnostics, and runtime readiness
Commercial-ready
Buyer-first
Competition-compatible
Products
PrivateDAO product corridors, service packs, and buyer-facing offerings

This route collects the startup-facing product layer: service packages, buyer corridors, and the clearest explanation of what PrivateDAO sells and ships.

Open governOpen live stateOpen curated docs
Private treasury teams and internal governance operators

PrivateDAO Core

The main governance system for private proposals, treasury execution, reviewer-visible evidence, and additive V3 hardening.

ZKREFHEGovernance V3Settlement V3
Open core governance rail
Teams that need a familiar committee and council posture

Realms Compatibility Rail

A compatibility-facing surface for organizations that still think in Realms-style committees but need stronger privacy, proof, and operational rails.

ZK reviewFast RPCReviewer docs
Open reviewer compatibility rail
Mobile-first operators and signer workflows

Android Native

A mobile and Android-facing runtime path for wallet access, reviewer journeys, and diagnostics without pretending the product is desktop-only.

Wallet UXDiagnosticsFast RPC
Open Android runtime surface
Reward programs, tournaments, and token-native communities

Gaming DAO Corridor

MagicBlock-backed evidence corridors for reward distribution and proposal-scoped settlement logic where responsiveness matters.

MagicBlockSettlement V3Proof
Open gaming corridor
Builders, operators, and hosted governance consumers

Read API + RPC

A commercial and operational surface for hosted reads, diagnostics, API-facing ops, and buyer-friendly product packaging.

Fast RPCHosted Read APIOps
Open API and RPC surface

Pilot Package

Best for teams validating private governance and treasury operations before a longer rollout.

Week-by-week onboarding, trust packet, readiness framing, and guided operating plan.
Open pilot program

Hosted Read API + Ops

Best for apps or teams that need cleaner governance data, evidence reads, and reviewer exports.

Hosted read surfaces, ops guidance, reviewer packet alignment, and product-facing API framing.
Open service catalog

Confidential Operations Premium

Best for payroll, bonus, and private treasury teams that need stronger confidentiality boundaries.

REFHE paths, V3 hardening, evidence-gated treasury flows, and operator trust surfaces.
Open pricing model

Enterprise Governance Retainer

Best for organizations that want longer-term support across launch, controls, and operator workflows.

SLA framing, trust package, release-gate review, and governance operations guidance.
Open SLA

Commercial services

Hosted Read API + Ops

Serve governance state, runtime evidence, and diagnostics through a cleaner operational API layer.

Pilot Package

Week-by-week rollout with trust packet, SLA framing, and buyer-friendly onboarding.

Confidential Operations Premium

Add encrypted payout boundaries, V3 hardening, and reviewer-ready execution evidence.

Pilot and trust journey

Pilot Program

Week-by-week rollout packet for teams that want guided adoption rather than a raw protocol integration.

Service Level Agreement

Operational framing for hosted reads, response expectations, and trust boundaries.

Pricing Model

Commercial packaging for API, ops, and confidential governance support without hiding the technical stack.

Trust Package

A buyer-readable path into proof packets, runtime evidence, and launch readiness boundaries.

Reviewer and trust links

Story video

The comprehensive product reel that explains everything PrivateDAO offers and why the project is competition-ready.

Judge proof view

Fastest reviewer path into the live product proof surface.

Audit packet

Generated audit-facing packet that ties reviewer and launch evidence together.

Launch trust packet

Commercial and launch trust narrative with boundaries kept explicit.

Release readiness register

Clear list of what still needs custody, audit, and runtime evidence before real-funds launch.

Presentation deck

Pitch-ready investor and competition presentation surface.

Live proof V3

Dedicated additive hardening proof packet for Governance V3 and Settlement V3.

Why this matters

Custody summary
Custody workflow exists, but no structured ceremony evidence is recorded yet.
Pending external

The product now exposes a strict custody ingestion path, but the mainnet boundary stays blocked until real multisig details, signer keys, transfer signatures, and readout references are recorded.

Evidence completion: 0/6
Recognition tied to evidence

The awards surface should not be vanity-only. It should route judges, buyers, and operators directly into proof packets, trust surfaces, and production-readiness context.

Readiness discipline

This Next.js surface keeps the same discipline as the current site: Devnet proof is shown as Devnet proof, and the remaining launch-critical work stays visible as the next readiness gate rather than hidden behind vague claims.
